stemHtml: With respect to aural alerts, what is correct regarding the alert when approaching an impending stall?

options.a: The sound is the same but quieter than the master alert, since it has less priority than other alerts.
options.b: The sound is unique to distinguish this situation from other alerts.
options.c: The sound is the same as the master caution.
options.d: The sound is the same as the master alert.
